remaining_tasks.name: Run all 20 golden cases, measure pass rate after FedStat + JSON fixes
remaining_tasks.description: FedStat geo column fix (ОКАТО/ОКСМ) should unblock many cases. Run batch via scripts/run_golden_cases.py or equivalent. Target: unacceptable==0 in phase2-golden-results.json.

remaining_tasks.name: WB all-missing_value rows: narrator says 'нет данных' but chart renders 198 rows — contradictory UX
remaining_tasks.description: GC-004: 198 WB rows all missing_value. Outcome=passed, chart renders inline. Narrator says data absent. Fix: narrator should say 'данные есть, но значения отсутствуют за этот период' OR critic downgrades outcome when ALL records are missing_value.

remaining_tasks.name: GC-011: no_data supervisor route overridden by intent.needs_clarification
remaining_tasks.description: In graph.py _route_after_intent(), intent.needs_clarification is checked before supervisor_route=no_data. Fix: check supervisor_route=='no_data' first, then needs_clarification.

remaining_tasks.name: FedStat cumulative data: only 3 of 13 rows extracted for 61502 (exports indicator)
remaining_tasks.description: 61502.parquet has 13 rows (cumulative, нарастающим итогом, Jan-Dec). Extractor returned only 3 rows. Suspect: period filter sends month ISO strings that don't match year column names in wide Parquet format.

remaining_tasks.name: SSE hang: 'Думает' stays on screen after pipeline ends
remaining_tasks.description: server.py _handle_stream finally block may not send terminal SSE event on error paths.

decisions.decision: Number verifier: advisory warning only, never blocks outcome
decisions.rationale: False positives on rounded/scaled values; adapters guarantee source-bound numbers
Intent analyst prompt updated; RD handles decomposition via Qwen

decisions.decision: Partial coverage: status=partial accepted, narrator adds ⚠️ note
decisions.rationale: User wants partial data over not_found

decisions.decision: LLM unavailable → gated/stopped, zero fallback paths
decisions.rationale: Core architectural invariant, UI label fixed to reflect this

decisions.decision: FedStat geo detection: ОКАТО+ОКСМ added to needle list in fedstat_adapter.py
decisions.rationale: Wide Parquet files use Russian classifier column names not matching English 'geo'/'region' needles

decisions.decision: JSON truncation: repair-then-raise fallback, max_tokens bumped to 1024/2048
decisions.rationale: Russian text verbose; 512 tokens too small for research design + narrator
Deterministic JSON output more reliable for factual summaries

next_action: Run full 20-case golden eval to measure impact of fixes. Then fix wb-missing-value-ux and gc011-routing.
context_notes: Session resolved 3 merge conflicts in narrator.py from rebase onto updated main. All 10 fixes committed and pushed to origin/main at 839b54d. No uncommitted changes remain.
